message:
feat(node-tests): add native runtime test script for Node.js/Bun

This script runs the same Node.js API tests directly on Node.js or Bun
without compilation, useful for:
- Validating test correctness (Node.js should pass 100%)
- Checking Bun compatibility as reference
- Local development and debugging

Usage:
  ./scripts/run-node-core-tests-native.sh node buffer
  ./scripts/run-node-core-tests-native.sh bun buffer

Note: This is NOT used in CI. The CI tests are specifically about
EdgeBox's Node.js API compatibility, not performance comparison.
Adding Node.js/Bun to CI would show 100%/100%/X% which doesn't add value
since Node.js/Bun will always pass their own API tests.

The existing EdgeBox test (run-node-core-tests.sh) includes compilation
time, but that's fine - the goal is compatibility testing, not speed.
